title: com.para.actor.defs
summary: Actor-oriented view models for influence, contributions, active communities, and resolved public status.
relationships: Supports profile and hover-card style surfaces in Para.
Pairs naturally with com.para.status for public actor presentation.
constraints: Profile stats require influence, votes received, votes cast, contributions, active communities, and computedAt.
Contribution counters require policies, matters, and comments.

fields.name: profileStats
fields.description: Aggregated Para profile statistics including influence and participation totals.

fields.name: contributions
fields.description: All-time counters for policies, matters, and comments.

fields.name: activeIn
fields.description: Top communities where the actor contributes.

fields.name: statusView
fields.description: Resolved status view with public status text, party, community, and creation timestamp.
